name: Formbook Process Creation Detected
description: Detects Formbook-like process executions that inject code and attempt to delete the dropper from temporary or desktop locations.

prompts.prompt: A Formbook-like process creation was detected, showing signs of code injection and dropper deletion. This is a high-risk indicator of malware activity. Event Details: **Timestamp** {timestamp}, **Process ID** {process_id}, **Parent Process ID** {parent_process_id}, **User** {user}, **Image** {image}, **Command Line** {command_line}. Investigate this critical event immediately for signs of malware infection and system compromise.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: process_id
parameters.description: The ID of the newly created process.

parameters.name: parent_process_id
parameters.description: The ID of the parent process that created the new process.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which the process was created.

parameters.name: image
parameters.description: The full path to the executable image of the created process.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line of the created process, including deletion attempts.
